description: Infinite spring — repeatedly emits 'Hello, world.' until interrupted. We cap ticks and verify a prefix.
expected_output:
Hello, world.
Hello, world.
Hello, world.

2003-cal-henderson.notes: Perl module emits the first line one tick later than others.

2003-jeff-binder.skip_reason: Runs without a tick limit, so the amount of output varies with wall-clock timing; not practical to pin an exact expected output.
